source-discipline.reason: The deployment-state correction (v10.14 LIVE, not pending) is verified against the operative session PI, whose header reads 'V10.14 - Revised 2026-05-20' - direct evidence v10.14 is deployed. The DR-2026-05-28-c hooks_status queue entry is grounded in migration 021 + the confirmed-present population_integrity_audit.py. v10.16 and v10.15-rejected sections preserved unchanged.

adherence-logging-and-attestation.reason: Updates the prior attestation for the touched file (decisions/ path). Commit carries [DOCTRINE: 3da73bd] before the timestamp per the v10.14 canonical form; doctrine_sha bumped 61c7f95 -> 3da73bd to match HEAD:governance/mission-and-epistemics.md after the Stage 1.1 doctrine commit.

bias_direction: Risk of prematurely declaring the queue empty when two documentation-only items (v10.16 skill line, DR-28-c hooks_status line) remain queued. Mitigated by keeping both queued entries explicit in the header and their own sections rather than silently dropping them, and by distinguishing the closed rule/bootstrap-track paste from the still-open documentation-only bundle.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer could argue that marking v10.14 'deployed' from the session header alone is circumstantial. Counter: the operative PI loaded for this session is the authoritative signal of what is live in project settings - the same evidence basis the file itself used previously ('the most recent session prompt loaded v10.13, confirming deployment') - and the repo snapshot governance/project-instructions-v10_14.md exists; the correction merely advances the same inference one version forward.
